name: Transom LED Blue Courtesy Light

specs.bodyMaterial: stainless-steel-look ABS plastic bezel, polycarbonate blue lens
specs._raw_seller_title: 4Pcs Boat Transom Light 10-30V Universal Waterproof Marine Boat Underwater Pontoon Transom Lamp 4 LED Blue Courtesy Lights
specs._raw_application: boat transom / pontoon / underwater accent / courtesy

description: Universal 10-30V marine LED courtesy light, sold in a 4-pack. Each fixture has a chrome-finish ABS oval bezel with a blue polycarbonate lens housing 4 SMD LEDs, intended for transom, pontoon, side-marker or underwater accent use. IP67 waterproof. Two short pigtail leads (red +, black -) exit the back for wiring; pack includes 8 self-tapping screws (2 per fixture).
packageContents: 4 x blue LED courtesy light fixtures
8 x stainless self-tapping mounting screws (2 per fixture)
